description: Deterministic radial/toroidal decomposition contract for production-scale 5D nonlinear GK scheduling with executable local rank-tile evidence. This is not distributed MPI or multi-GPU scaling evidence.
missing_requirements: MPI or multi-GPU distributed execution path over the declared rank tiles
same-physics convergence evidence across distributed MPI/multi-GPU decomposition shapes
hardware-specific multi-rank throughput and efficiency thresholds
